'''sadhuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noblewoman|noblewoman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noblewoman|noblewoman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sadhuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædhijith|sædhijith]] || [[word:sædhijij|sædhijij]] || [[word:sædhijish|sædhijish]] || [[word:sædhiji|sædhiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhudhujuth|sadhudhujuth]] || [[word:sadhudhujuj|sadhudhujuj]] || [[word:sadhudhujush|sadhudhujush]] || [[word:sadhudhuju|sadhudhuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhujuth|sadhujuth]] || [[word:sadhujuj|sadhujuj]] || [[word:sadhujush|sadhujush]] || [[word:sadhuju|sadhuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhufjuth|sadhufjuth]] || [[word:sadhufjuj|sadhufjuj]] || [[word:sadhufjush|sadhufjush]] || [[word:sadhufjuf|sadhufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadhujuthu|sadhujuthu]] || [[word:sadhujuju|sadhujuju]] || [[word:sadhujushu|sadhujushu]] || [[word:sadhujuku|sadhujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadhujuth|sadhujuth]] || [[word:sadhujuj|sadhujuj]] || [[word:sadhujush|sadhujush]] || [[word:sadhuju|sadhuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadhujuthul|sadhujuthul]] || [[word:sadhujujul|sadhujujul]] || [[word:sadhujushul|sadhujushul]] || [[word:sadhujukul|sadhujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadhujuthuthu|sadhujuthuthu]] || [[word:sadhujujuju|sadhujujuju]] || [[word:sadhujushushu|sadhujushushu]] || [[word:sadhujuku|sadhujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadhujuthun|sadhujuthun]] || [[word:sadhujujun|sadhujujun]] || [[word:sadhujushun|sadhujushun]] || [[word:sadhujukun|sadhujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadhujuthuoro|sadhujuthuoro]] || [[word:sadhujujuoro|sadhujujuoro]] || [[word:sadhujushuoro|sadhujushuoro]] || [[word:sadhujukuoro|sadhujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
